description: Bounded installed-artifact recovery-release matrix. This contract does not import the twelve landing-page marketing stages.

requirements: second installed process reloads credentials without registration
member screening, substitutions, and provenance render
stale list or context authority rejection
no blind retry after uncertain dispatch
typed runtime failure remains usable and restores on subsequent clean exit
full presentation restoration after normal and application-interrupt exits
native-signal canonical-mode and body-error or panic restoration remain required companion CI gates
real platform credential backend on the final signed candidate
